title: Narathiwat Heat Wave
lead: Narathiwat is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.83. The city's temperature has reached critical levels, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Narathiwat is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 12.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 68%, and the wind speed is 1.5 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The city's residents are advised to take necessary precautions to stay safe, as the heat wave is expected to continue, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
